description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a default node:17-alpine image, a cache keyed by the commit ref slug that stores node_modules/, packages/ag/node_modules/, demo/redux/node_modules/ and package-lock.json, and a before_script that echoes CPU and memory info, prints node and npm versions, shows the working directory and directory listing. Define four stages: install, build, test, and deploy. In the install stage add an install job that runs `npm run i` then `npm run e2e:install`, stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact for 2 hours, retries twice, and is excluded on tags. In the build stage add a build job that depends on install, runs `npm run build:gitlab` and `npm run copy:stats`, publishes lib/ and public/ as 2‑hour artifacts, retries twice, and is excluded on tags. In the test stage add a unit job that depends on build and install, runs `npm run unit:ci`, `npm run copy:stats`, and `npm run copy:coverage`, stores public/ as a 2‑hour artifact, retries twice, and is excluded on tags; also add chrome and firefox jobs that use the image registry.hub.docker.com/atlassianlabs/docker-node-jdk-chrome-firefox:latest, depend on build and install, each create a symlink to the browser binary, print its version, and run `npm run e2e:build`, with retries and tag exclusion. In the deploy stage add a pages job (only on the master branch of wallzero/react-digest) that uses node:17, depends on build, chrome, install, and unit, runs `echo "deploying demo to gitlab pages"`, and publishes lib/ and public/ as the GitLab Pages artifact, and a publish job (same branch restriction) that runs `npm run release`; both retry twice and are excluded on tags.
